title: Machine-Verified SQG Shear-Vorticity Identity (Lean 4)
description: Lean 4 + mathlib formalization of the SQG shear-vorticity identity (D14 Theorem 1). Two lemmas are fully machine-verified with zero sorry: one_sub_cos_two_mul (1 - cos(2x) = 2 sin²(x)) and half_times_one_sub_cos ((|k|/2)(1-cos(2φ)) = |k|·sin²(φ)). The main theorem statement typechecks; algebraic reduction body is in progress. Mathematical theorem by Bryan Sanchez (independent researcher); Lean formalization by Bryan Sanchez with AI assistance.
